{{CargoOrgan
|name=Wildhunt Liontail
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10707
|idx=65
|description="Mind the tail! Every veteran merc at the Oak Tavern will raise a mug and grimly recall that fiery lash from the depths of the Hunt…" — Chronicles of the Griffon
|skill=On combat start, the Manticore fires a magic sting, dealing DMG equal to 120% of ATK!
|hp=3320
|def=252
|atk=230
|rush=256
|gene1=Per orange or higher organ equipped, {race} RUSH +42
Orange or higher Organs equipped: 7/7
|gene2=In Gene Sims, CRIT +20%
|gene3=When weakness is spotted, CRIT +14%
|gene4=RUSH Ignore DEF +4%
|gene5=For Round 1, CRIT DMG +20%
|gene6=When weakness is spotted, CRIT DMG +14%
|gene7=For Round 1, CRIT DMG +20% (Awakened)
|}}
